SvToolCall.description:
Generic format for Assistant API call to make an '" + this.svType() + "' tool call.
    See schema for the particular tool call (whose name is in the toolName property) for the expected "parameters" property schema.

callId.description: A unique identifier for the call. The response will be tagged with this id.

parameters.description: JSON object of key/value parameters for the tool call.

toolName.description: The name of the tool to call.

toolNote.description: A note about the tool call which might contain info related to errors or retries. Purely for debugging purposes.
